name: What to Do with a Turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Place salt and pepper in the cavity of the turkey.
2. Rub butter or margarine all over the outside of the turkey.
3. Put the turkey in a roasting pan and bake according to the package instructions.
4. Slice most of the turkey breasts and make turkey gravy.
5. Freeze the sliced turkey and gravy for later use with mashed potatoes.
6. Shred the remaining turkey meat off the bones.
7. Divide the shredded turkey into 1-2 cup portions and freeze.
8. Use the shredded turkey for turkey enchiladas, following a standard chicken enchilada recipe.
9. Remove all the meat from the turkey carcass.
10. Place the carcass in a large pot and add peppercorns, bay leaves, onions, carrots, celery, and water.
11. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until reduced by almost half.
12. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.
13. Strain the broth and discard solids.
14. Add some of the shredded turkey and fresh diced vegetables (carrots and celery) to make turkey soup.
